description: PUH-BrianMartell-the rotating wheel / cycloid insight is a beautiful geometric bridge into the PUH cascade. The area under one arch of a cycloid generated by a rolling circle of radius r is exactly 3πr² — three times the circle’s own area. This integer scaling emerges purely from rolling-without-slipping rotation and ties directly to rotational gating (T244), the mobility-limited gradient flow (T247 refining T246), and the pulsed, clockwork accumulation at primordial cores. The images you shared (the flower/star vent on the Kamado-style dome) visually evoke a rotating multi-lobed boundary — a practical analog for how a rotating core interface might sweep substrate in a cycloidal pattern during folding.

PPO multi-cat test seed for Saurabh (branch 4a24856f-…): 10 items, all multi-category in the menu, seeded ONLY under their primary (Soft Drinks, Fresh Vegetables, Sweets & Chocolate). Tests merch→primary resolution.
